name: Solivan Brugmansia
description:
Stalking his stalker.

It was easy to maintain this illusion of control. The people around you were terrified of Sol, which you used to your advantage. You deliberately drew out that possessive side of him, knowing it made him look even more intimidating. His fierce protectiveness served as a barrier, keeping potential rivals at bay. You liked to remind yourself that he was yours, and no one else could have him...

┏━°⌜ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛꜱ⌟°━┓

Character name: Solivan Brugmansia
